economic_mechanism: Test repeated, measurable exposure mechanisms with outcome-independent specificity controls and dependence-aware inference; the first exact test asked whether broad-index overnight selling absorbed by regular-session demand leads short-horizon upward drift.
forecast_type: free multi-mechanism direction, volatility, or time-bias discovery with one named decision per wake
candidate_or_family_scope: First decision closed BROAD_INDEX_OVERNIGHT_ABSORPTION_BULL_CALL_21D_V1 / BROAD_INDEX_OVERNIGHT_SELL_INTRADAY_ABSORPTION_FORWARD_UPDRIFT at F0 after a dense four-index train panel showed negative event and paired centers plus a failed tail gate. Future epoch decisions must use materially different mechanisms or evidence classes, not threshold/horizon/option-wrapper salvage.
falsifier: Each wake must close its predeclared named candidate or family under frozen chronology, control, density, uncertainty, tail, integrity, capital, and authority boundaries. Two consecutive counted wakes without STRATEGY_ADVANCED require a materially different mechanism/evidence-class pivot; three require burst stop and reassessment.
epoch_success_definition: Advance one named candidate at least from F0_MECHANISM to F1_TRAIN under its frozen discovery bar while preserving sealed holdout identities and claim-appropriate authority boundaries; capability or plumbing alone is not success.
next_seed: YIELD_CURVE_STEEPENING_REGIONAL_BANK_FORWARD_UPDRIFT_PREFLIGHT: test whether a completed, point-in-time steepening in a fixed Treasury-duration proxy spread forecasts KRE upside beyond prior same-regime controls, with train density and a future one-lot defined-risk bull-call expression frozen before outcomes; reject the route pre-outcome if ETF proxy semantics cannot support the stated lending-margin mechanism.
